title: Fuze Mod
description: an april fool based on the french youtuber FuzeIII
body:
### Explication:

This mod is a mod created in some days on mcreator, not finished... The mod going to be updated after the april fool day because i need to add a lot of things like a dimension, a bossfight, etc...

![Actually, this image is fuze but it's a nerd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db769b536ddf43b0397d98951a1c45f31e82d9b6_0.webp)

### **WARNING**


This mod is based on the youtuber FuzeIII and the memes/references of his channel !
Channel : youtube.com/@FuzeIII

WARNING : SPOILER !!!!


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

This mod contain new items, new entities, a new dimension
In this mod, you can see a blockling named didier based from the [Blockling mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blocklings)

there is a paintings, new weapon named "Fuze sword", a new sword which have the capacity to make you really bad at pvp, or the "Fuze glasses" to have the same view like the youtuber.
</details>

### Bug report:
please for any bugs just contact me on discord : (cameleongamerYT)

### Any suggest ?

contact me on discord (cameleongamerYT) if you have anything to add in the mod !
